LanguageData.Deathrest.description: Research into advanced treatments for the Wendigo Shakes.
LanguageData.Deathrest.label: Wendigo Shakes Treatment
LanguageData.GR_GeneticAlteration.description: Recover West Tek tissue processing methods and build the extraction hardware needed to break subjects down into usable strain templates.
LanguageData.GR_GeneticAlteration.label: West Tek tissue alteration
LanguageData.GR_GeneticCompatibility.label: human strain compatibility
LanguageData.GR_GeneticDuplication.description: Duplicate proven strain templates and preserve valuable West Tek genomes for repeated use.
LanguageData.GR_GeneticDuplication.label: strain duplication
LanguageData.GR_GeneticEngineering.description: Use West Tek vats, incubation tanks, and booster benches to assemble new test organisms and forced-evolution prototypes.
LanguageData.GR_GeneticEngineering.label: FEV prototyping
LanguageData.GR_GeneticMechahybridization.label: cybernetic hybridization
LanguageData.GR_HybridImplantology.label: bio-augment grafting
